subject: WM-0122 ready for review
body: Delivered independent M8 anomaly roster/spec artifact with 12 accepted targets, 3 stretch targets, zh-CN/en coverage expectations, scenario fixture expectations, data-mod policy alignment, and WM-0123/WM-0124 handoff notes. Protected M5 files stayed at HEAD/no-diff; verified m5-invariants, handoff validation, taskctl validate/status, diff check, and pnpm quality.
